overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through Night City's dense urban environment. The character ascends from a ground-level plaza through neon-lit commercial streets and covered market alleys to upper-level rooftops, concluding with a fall onto a striped rooftop surface. The footage features bright midday sunlight contrasting with neon signage and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza beneath overpass with stair access

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs with red railings
reaches top of stairs, transitioning from enclosed plaza to open street level

agents.ego_description: walking through urban plaza and ascending stairs toward street level

entered.detail: open concrete ground area with scattered debris
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and posters
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags beside it
wide concrete stairway leading up to overpass level
red painted metal handrail along the stairway
concrete overpass with pedestrians visible on top

segments.scene_description: Starting in a concrete plaza beneath an overpass, the character walks past graffiti-covered walls and green dumpsters before ascending a wide concrete stairway with red railings to reach the street level above.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with vending machines and pedestrian traffic

events.description: character turns slightly left while walking along the sidewalk
approaching the entrance to a covered alleyway beneath the El Guapo building

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy sidewalk lined with neon signs and vending machines, navigating through pedestrian crowds

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: red and white vending machine with glowing lights
large purple neon sign reading EL GUAPO on building facade
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit commercial street lined with neon vending machines and green railings, the character moves through moderate pedestrian traffic toward the prominent El Guapo building with its distinctive purple signage, preparing to enter a covered alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with neon-lit food stalls and pawn shops

events.description: enters covered alleyway beneath the El Guapo building, transitioning from bright sunlight to shaded interior
passing under neon red and green lights illuminating the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow covered alley lined with food stalls and shops, moving toward a stairwell at the far end

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter
child walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and ceiling fans
food counter with striped awning and glowing menu
yellow and black sign reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP
stairway leading upward at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered alley beneath the El Guapo building, the scene shifts to a dimly lit corridor with neon red and green lights, food stalls, and a pawn shop. The character walks toward a stairwell at the end while passing a vendor and a child ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stairwell transitioning to outdoor upper plaza

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs within the covered structure
exits the covered stairwell into bright sunlight at the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs through the covered walkway and emerging into bright daylight at the upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: child continuing up the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: tall green residential building with multiple air conditioning units
concrete bench with people sitting

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete stairs through the covered interior, the character follows a child upward and emerges into bright sunlight at an upper plaza level, revealing a green apartment building and people resting on benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with views of towering skyscrapers

events.description: character transitions from walking to running across the upper plaza
camera tilts upward to look at the towering green buildings and overhead wires
approaches the edge of the rooftop overlooking the street level below

agents.ego_description: running across the upper plaza and looking up at the surrounding skyscrapers, then approaching a rooftop edge

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a concrete bench conversing

entered.detail: dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing between buildings
massive futuristic tower with steam vents near the top
concrete rooftop with yellow and white striped markings

segments.scene_description: Running across the sunlit upper plaza, the character moves past sitting pedestrians and looks up at the dense network of overhead wires and towering green skyscrapers, eventually approaching a rooftop edge with striped markings and scattered tires.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop with industrial debris and striped safety markings

events.description: character falls or jumps onto the striped rooftop surface
character lies motionless on the rooftop, suggesting incapacitation or death
camera pans around the rooftop showing scattered tires and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: lying motionless on the rooftop surface after falling, while the camera pans to survey the surrounding environment

entered.detail: pile of black rubber tires scattered across the rooftop
steam rising from vents on the distant skyscraper

segments.scene_description: The character falls onto a sunlit rooftop marked with yellow and white stripes, landing near scattered tires and remaining motionless. The camera pans around to reveal the surrounding green buildings, overhead wires, and distant steam-emitting skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a gritty concrete underpass through a dense urban commercial district to a high-altitude rooftop. It begins in a concrete plaza beneath an overpass, moving past graffiti-covered walls and up a wide stairway to reach a sunlit street lined with neon vending machines. As the character approaches the purple signage of the El Guapo building, the scene shifts from the bright exterior into a dimly lit, covered alleyway filled with red and green neon lights and food stalls. The camera then follows a path upward through an interior stairwell, emerging back into the midday sun at an upper plaza surrounded by green skyscrapers and overhead wires. Finally, the movement culminates in a fall onto a yellow-and-white striped rooftop, where the camera pans to reveal a sprawling cityscape of steam-emitting towers and futuristic architecture.
